expectations.evidence: Finding: 'Password Stored in JWT Payload · 🔴 Critical · A02 Cryptographic Failures' at app/api/auth/route.ts:10 — with Evidence showing password field in jwt.sign()
Finding: 'Wildcard CORS Combined with Credentials Allowed · 🔴 Critical · A05 Security Misconfiguration' — explicitly flags both headers and explains the danger
Finding: 'Hardcoded Credentials Used as Authentication Source · 🔴 Critical · A07 Authentication Failures' — flags admin/admin123 with evidence code block
Finding: 'JWT Algorithm Not Pinned · 🟠 High · A07' — shows jwt.verify without { algorithms: ['HS256'] } as evidence, and provides fix with the option
Finding: 'No Security Headers (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, etc.) · 🟡 Medium' — explicitly names CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options as missing, with fix code block
Covers API route issues (auth/route.ts — backend) AND configuration-level issues (next.config.js CORS + missing security headers). Also covers middleware.ts for JWT algorithm.
